hero.title: One
hero.subtitle: Centralize, govern, and orchestrate your Model Context Protocol tools in a unified platform. Access from anywhere—desktop or mobile.

mobileDemo.title: Turn Hours of Manual Work
mobileDemo.description: BigMCP lets you compose custom workflows that orchestrate multiple services with a single command. Create your own multi-tool compositions once, then execute them instantly from anywhere.
features: Compose workflows from your existing tools (HubSpot, Drive, Gmail, Slack...)
Execute multi-service operations with natural language
Your custom compositions become callable tools for your whole team
Run complex workflows from Claude—desktop or mobile

phoneMockup.userMessage: Onboard new client: Acme Corp (contact: john@acme.com, sector: B2B SaaS)
phoneMockup.thinkingText: User created a custom workflow for complete client onboarding. Will execute across CRM, Drive, Gmail, and Slack systems.
phoneMockup.resultIntro: I've set up Acme Corp in all your systems:
phoneMockup.driveDetails: Complete structure with contracts and billing
phoneMockup.conclusion: Everything is ready to start collaboration with Acme Corp.

challenge.title: The MCP Governance Challenge
challenge.subtitle: As your MCP ecosystem grows, managing tools becomes complex and risky
withoutItems: Each MCP server manages its own credentials
No centralized access control or auditing
withItems: Single governance layer for all MCPs

howItWorks.title: How BigMCP Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to unified MCP governance

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.description: Sign up with your email. Your credentials are encrypted and synced across all devices.

steps.title: Connect MCP Servers
steps.description: Add your existing MCP servers to BigMCP. Configure credentials and access policies for each server.

steps.title: Use & Compose Tools
steps.description: Simply use tools or combine them into powerful workflows. No complexity, just results delivered instantly.

features.title: Everything You Need to
features.subtitle: Built for teams that take MCP governance seriously

items.title: Unified Authentication
items.description: Single OAuth 2.0 + PKCE flow for AI clients. Encrypted credential storage with organizational and user-level isolation.

items.title: Tool Orchestration
items.description: Compose multi-tool workflows with automatic credential injection and hierarchical bindings for complex operations.

items.title: Mobile Access
items.description: Your MCP tools available on mobile, tablet, anywhere. Same authentication, same experience, zero configuration.

items.title: Usage Analytics
items.description: Track tool execution, success rates, and usage patterns across your organization with comprehensive usage tracking.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Cloud managed or self-hosted—you choose
pricing.note: Cloud editions are available now with managed LLM included. Self-hosted editions let you choose your LLM provider.

finalCta.title: Ready to Govern Your MCP Ecosystem?
finalCta.subtitle: Start your free trial today. No credit card required.
